title: orthion montanum
intro: Orthion montanum, also known as Mountain Orthion, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Saxifragaceae family, commonly used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Orthion montanum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
